name: Informes 3r trimestre Alice Ling Excellent.pdf
content:
Kids&Us.

COURSE OBJECTIVES - FAIRY TALES 1, 3rd term

---

Term report (3rd term)

Data

Name:                Alice Ling
Teacher:             Huryv Osmanova
Level:               Tweens 3 2024/2025
Absences:            0

Behaviour

Assessment (Behaviour):        Excellent
Comment: Alice continues to be a kind, responsible, and respectful student. She is always polite and considerate towards both her classmates and teachers. She actively listens, engages in class discussions, and consistently asks for clarification when she doesn't understand something. Her positive and cooperative nature contributes to a welcoming and supportive classroom environment.

Work

Assessment (Work):             Excellent
Comment: Alice remains an engaged and hardworking student. She participates actively in class and completes her tasks with enthusiasm. She consistently takes initiative in her learning and demonstrates great responsibility. However, she should make an effort to revise more regularly and complete all assigned homework to reinforce her understanding of the material.

Performance

Assessment (Performance):       Excellent
Comment: Alice continues to excel in her academic performance. She has achieved excellent results in her assessments and demonstrates a strong grasp of vocabulary, grammar, and comprehension. Her test results are consistently impressive, and she shows great confidence in both oral and written tasks.

Marks

Oral Test Mark: 10.00 Excellent.
Writing Mark: 9.80 Excellent.
Homework mark: 0.00 Needs to improve.

---

Final comment

Alice has proven to be a bright, motivated, and dedicated student. She consistently demonstrates a strong command of English and maintains excellent behaviour and participation in class. With improved consistency in completing homework and regular revision, she is well-positioned to continue excelling.

name: Informes 3r trimestre Romain Fafchamps Good.pdf
content:
Kids&Us.

COURSE OBJECTIVES - FAIRY TALES 1, 3rd term

---

Term report (3rd term)

Data

Name:            Romain Fachamps
Teacher:         Huryu Osmanova
Level:           Tweens 3 2024/2025
Absences:        0

Behaviour

Assessment (Behaviour):    Excellent
Comment: Romain continues to be a kind, respectful, and responsible student. He consistently maintains a positive attitude in class and creates a welcoming atmosphere for both classmates and the teacher. He is cooperative, listens attentively, and asks questions when unsure.

Work

Assessment (Work):         Good
Comment: Romain works diligently and remains committed to his studies. He actively participates in discussions and approaches learning with curiosity. When facing difficulties, he takes the initiative to seek clarification.

Performance

Assessment (Performance):  Good
Comment: Romain performed well in assessments, showing a solid understanding of the material. He continues to expand his vocabulary and improve sentence structure. Focusing on revising vocabulary and grammar will enhance his accuracy.

Marks

Oral Test Mark: 7.20 Good.
Writing Mark: 7.90 Good.
Homework mark: 6.50 Acceptable.

---

Final comment

Over the course of the year, Romain has shown consistent dedication and grown in confidence, particularly in speaking and writing. His positive attitude and respectful nature benefit the classroom environment. To continue his progress over the summer, he should focus on regular reading, writing practice, and speaking activities.

Term report (3rd term)

Name:                  Ylena Salmon
Teacher:               Huruv Osmanova
Level:                 Tweens 3 2024/2025

Behaviour

Assessment (Behaviour):            Excellent
Comment: Ylena continues to be a kind, responsible, and respectful student. She always comes to class with a positive attitude and maintains a strong connection with both her teacher and classmates. She is attentive, asks questions when she does not understand something, and actively engages in discussions.

Work

Assessment (Work):                 Very good
Comment: Ylena is a hardworking student who consistently participates in class activities. She is always engaged in discussions, actively contributing to group work and classroom exercises. She demonstrates responsibility in her learning and asks for clarification whenever needed.

Performance

Assessment (Performance):          Excellent
Comment: Ylena performed very well in her assessments. She is a confident speaker and expresses her thoughts clearly. She has a strong grasp of vocabulary and sentence structures but should continue to revise certain grammar points for greater accuracy.

Marks

Oral Test Mark: 9.40 Excellent.
Writing Mark: 8.70 Very good.
Homework mark: 0.00 Needs to improve.

---

Final comment

Ylena has shown consistent dedication throughout the year. She maintains a positive attitude, shows respect to her peers and teacher, and takes initiative in her learning. Her strong speaking and writing skills reflect her overall engagement. With improved homework habits and continued focus on grammar and vocabulary, she has great potential to reach excellence across all areas.
